text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Flourish & Blotts — Agent Loop, Tool Executor, and Deterministic Guards

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Two trigger paths feed the same agentic loop. The executor fans tool calls out in parallel and back in. Guards (customer / ops confirmation) are durable, deterministic, harness-enforced.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Guard expansion — customer_confirmation (deterministic, durable)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: What happens between “tool_use: substitute_item” and the impl actually running:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. Spawn CustomerConfirmationWorkflow as a child of this workflow

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Inside that child: send Approve/Deny email (MailHog SMTP)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. expose pending decision via query for the /orders/:id page

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Parent workflow awaits child for up to 25h (Temporal durably waits — survives restarts, crashes)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Email click OR page click → receive_customer_decision signal → child returns CustomerConfirmationResult

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: approved → Pass() → substitute_item interaction runs → ToolResult( substitution committed )

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: denied / timeout → Reject(reason="customer …") → Claude sees the reason and may pick a different substitute or

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: escalate

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Guard expansion — ops_confirmation (used by every MUTATING tool in OPS_TOOLS)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: E.g. agent calls cancel_order(order_id, reason) inside the ops Slack agent:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. Register asyncio.Future under tu.id in ctx.pending_actions

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. workflow.execute_activity( post_confirmation_card ) → Block-Kit card posted to the Slack thread

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Parent workflow awaits the future (Temporal durable wait, up to 30s timeout per attempt)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Operator clicks Confirm or Deny in Slack → Bolt app sends signal

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. receive_slack_action signal handler resolves the future with "confirm" / "deny"

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. workflow.execute_activity( collapse_buttons ) → freeze the card with a summary line

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: confirm → Pass() → cancel_order activity runs (with tool_use_id idempotency key)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: deny → Reject(reason="Operator declined…") → Claude acknowledges and moves on

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Outcomes returning from the loop

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Path 1 — OrderRepairWorkflow returns OrderRepairResult to OrderWorkflow:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: auto_repaired → saga resumes (rerun pick_and_pack / dispatch_delivery against the repaired order)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ops_approved → saga resumes; the agent already executed the validated plan steps inside the loop

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: customer_denied / ops_denied / unresolved → saga compensates: refund_payment → release_inventory_reservation → recall_delivery

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Path 2 — OpsAgentConversationWorkflow stays alive after each turn:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: end_turn → workflow posts the agent's reply text to the Slack thread, returns to wait_condition on the inbox

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 24h idle → workflow posts "thread closed" notice and exits cleanly

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Mutating-tool denials are normal mid-conversation and don't end the workflow.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Legend: blue = Temporal workflow / activity purple = Anthropic / agent loop orange = decision green = success / loop-back yellow = HITL guard red = failure / compensation
